column1: # H100 lane (rasmia_hopper). One queue file per node — see "Multi-node" in
# AGENTS.md: two schedulers must never share a queue file (done-files appear
# only at completion, so both would launch the same item).
# 32B on a single 80GB H100: 64GB bf16 base + LoRA online teacher, no sharding.
# Premise gate at the usual 0.7 — 14B passed at 0.852 and the margin shrinks
# with scale, so a 32B FAILURE here is an informative result, not an error.

column4: bash -c '.venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate.py --base --experiment configs/experiments/kd_lora_ce_hi_32b_rag.yaml --out runs/base-eval-full-32b && .venv/bin/python scripts/premise_gate.py runs/base-eval-full-32b/recite.json 0.7 && touch runs/.premise_32b_ok'
